title: Why does Monday force me to use column name CONTACT and not First and Last name. I don't want them grouped
excerpt: I don’t want CONTACT . I want FIRST NAME and LAST NAME (Like every database ever). Why does monday force me to use CONTACT. How do I delete it and change it?

posts.author: mattdenada (matt)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t want CONTACT . I want FIRST NAME and LAST NAME (Like every database ever). Why does monday force me to use CONTACT. How do I delete it and change it?

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mattdenada ,

Can you grab a screen snip and show where you mean CONTACT?
I’ve got first name and last name and you can have it too. You might be stuck on something else in disguise!

Emma
teameasy@easy-mondays.com
